name_en: 💖Includes full original retail packaging💖【New Arrival】Miu Miu's new best-selling bowling bag, made with top-tier vintage soft nappa leather, vintage matte-finish aged metal hardware. Inspired by Miu Miu's archival pieces, this Aventure Nappa tote has been restructured to be lighter and exudes a fresh personality, creating a classic style with timeless charm. The multi-element design gives this tote a unique aesthetic and classic vibe. Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, canvas lining with zip pocket and slip pocket. Model: 5bb168. Dimensions: 33(L) x 16.5(W) x 10cm(H). Color: Burgundy/Original Leather
